security.csp: default-src 'self' asset: http://ipc.localhost; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' asset: data: blob: https://*.discogs.com https://*.stripe.com https://*.supabase.co; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' http://ipc.localhost https://*.supabase.co https://api.103finder.shop https://*.discogs.com https://api.discogs.com https://*.stripe.com; frame-src https://js.stripe.com https://checkout.stripe.com https://billing.stripe.com; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self' https://checkout.stripe.com https://billing.stripe.com; frame-ancestors 'none'
